_comment: CANONICAL — server overwrites model output for this block if present on disk
skin_realism: visible pores, natural skin texture, slight uneven skin tone, tiny blemishes, fine peach fuzz, believable cheek/nose forehead shine where light hits; no beauty-blur plastic skin; no pore erasure; subtle sweat or skin oil acceptable in warm lit scenes — no runway retouch
hair_realism: individual stray hairs, flyaways, natural strand separation, slight frizz, realistic hair shine (not glossy CGI), wispy strands on skin near hairline acceptable
fabric_realism: visible fabric weave, natural wrinkles, lint, occasional pet hair or dust on clothing, realistic fabric drape
environment_realism: minor everyday clutter, small dust particles in light beams, slight smudges on surfaces, realistic shadow imperfections, lived-in feel; background feels incidental not art-directed
photo_realism: natural smartphone or consumer-camera behavior: mild ISO grain, slight handshake, occasional highlight clipping, mild motion micro-blur on moving hair or gestures; plausible mild JPEG/codec softness in flats (not CGI sharp-clarity); imperfect focus transitions; believable WB; no tripod catalog polish unless USER_TEXT specifies
color_grading: natural unedited colors, slight warmth or coolness depending on light source, no Instagram filter, no HDR oversaturation — avoid influencer tone curve
capture_authenticity: reads as someone's real camera roll — candid snapshot credibility, incidental framing; never stock-photo glossy or campaign retouch vibe unless USER explicitly asks
character_rendering: preserve the identity reference person's natural facial proportions and micro-asymmetry — not a generic model face; no beauty-filter morphology; no enlarged eyes vs identity; no V-line jaw slimming or sculpted filler look unless USER explicitly asks
imperfection_level: subtle but unmistakably physical — ordinary real life caught on sensor, never a sterile render — match selfie, tripod, mirror, third-party equally (only capture story changes)
